TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: gaga na utux Llyung lhuyan na gaga na utux Bbwan, utux gaga na Snlitan, ro gaga utux Nni'an, nya ini ptna' kwara, kruma ga hnyasun nya tyaba alang, kruma ga ini henas tyaba utux alang naha, ana ga kruma tna' naha tyaba utux alang uy. ro nya mso'un mra' gaga na utux llyung. cintlangan khangan Giranken micu ga, kyan utux tyaba na utux llyung, llyung Klesan ga nya maki knhangan na Nango Gokosyo micu, kwara lalu na alang ga, kyan alang na Rgayung, ro alang Rkinos nya maki alang kingyan kya, ro alang na Buta, ro alang na Pyahow, ro alang Cingan, nya syow tu'iy bih alang na Cingan kya, ro alang Iyu, ro payat kwara alang na Stacis kya ga kyan Syow butey, Rgyax, ro alang Koro, alang Koro ga nya maki bih alang Stacis kya uy. kwara hngiyang ke knayan kya ga ubuy ke na cyoli Tayal bih utux llyung Klesan, kruma nya maki alang Rgayung ro alang na kingyang, ro alang Cingan uy ga nya ubuy hngiyang ke na squliq kruma uy. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 江明清Yawi‧Nomin, .
S.PHON: ɣaɣa na utux lljuŋ lħujan na ɣaɣa na utux ββwan, utux ɣaɣa na s~ɕnlitan, ro ɣaɣa utux nniʔan, nja ini ptnaʔ kwara, kruma ɣa ħnjas~ɕun nja tjaβa alaŋ, kruma ɣa ini ħenas~ɕ tjaβa utux alaŋ naħa, ana ɣa kruma tnaʔ naħa tjaβa utux alaŋ uj. ro nja ms~ɕoʔun mraʔ ɣaɣa na utux lljuŋ. ʦ~ʨintlaŋan kħaŋan ɣiranken miʦ~ʨu ɣa, kjan utux tjaβa na utux lljuŋ, lljuŋ kles~ɕan ɣa nja maki knħaŋan na naŋo ɣokos~ɕjo miʦ~ʨu, kwara lalu na alaŋ ɣa, kjan alaŋ na rɣajuŋ, ro alaŋ rkinos~ɕ nja maki alaŋ kiŋjan kja, ro alaŋ na βuta, ro alaŋ na pjaħow, ro alaŋ ʦ~ʨiŋan, nja s~ɕjow tuʔij βiħ alaŋ na ʦ~ʨiŋan kja, ro alaŋ iju, ro pajat kwara alaŋ na s~ɕtaʦ~ʨis~ɕ kja ɣa kjan s~ɕjow βutej, rɣjax, ro alaŋ koro, alaŋ koro ɣa nja maki βiħ alaŋ s~ɕtaʦ~ʨis~ɕ kja uj. kwara ħŋijaŋ ke knajan kja ɣa uβuj ke na ʦ~ʨjoli tajal βiħ utux lljuŋ kles~ɕan, kruma nja maki alaŋ rɣajuŋ ro alaŋ na kiŋjaŋ, ro alaŋ ʦ~ʨiŋan uj ɣa nja uβuj ħŋijaŋ ke na s~ɕquliq kruma uj. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ***jawi*nomin, .
S.FORM: gaga na utux Llyung lhuyan na gaga na utux Bbwan, utux gaga na Snlitan, ro gaga utux Nni'an, nya ini ptna' kwara, kruma ga hnyasun nya tyaba alang, kruma ga ini henas tyaba utux alang naha, ana ga kruma tna' naha tyaba utux alang uy. ro nya mso'un mra' gaga na utux llyung. cintlangan khangan Giranken micu ga, kyan utux tyaba na utux llyung, llyung Klesan ga nya maki knhangan na Nango Gokosyo micu, kwara lalu na alang ga, kyan alang na Rgayung, ro alang Rkinos nya maki alang kingyan kya, ro alang na Buta, ro alang na Pyahow, ro alang Cingan, nya syow tu'iy bih alang na Cingan kya, ro alang Iyu, ro payat kwara alang na Stacis kya ga kyan Syow butey, Rgyax, ro alang Koro, alang Koro ga nya maki bih alang Stacis kya uy. kwara hngiyang ke knayan kya ga ubuy ke na cyoli Tayal bih utux llyung Klesan, kruma nya maki alang Rgayung ro alang na kingyang, ro alang Cingan uy ga nya ubuy hngiyang ke na squliq kruma uy. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 江明清Yawi‧Nomin, .
S.PHON: ɣaɣa na utux lljuŋ lħujan na ɣaɣa na utux ββwan, utux ɣaɣa na s~ɕnlitan, ro ɣaɣa utux nniʔan, nja ini ptnaʔ kwara, kruma ɣa ħnjas~ɕun nja tjaβa alaŋ, kruma ɣa ini ħenas~ɕ tjaβa utux alaŋ naħa, ana ɣa kruma tnaʔ naħa tjaβa utux alaŋ uj. ro nja ms~ɕoʔun mraʔ ɣaɣa na utux lljuŋ. ʦ~ʨintlaŋan kħaŋan ɣiranken miʦ~ʨu ɣa, kjan utux tjaβa na utux lljuŋ, lljuŋ kles~ɕan ɣa nja maki knħaŋan na naŋo ɣokos~ɕjo miʦ~ʨu, kwara lalu na alaŋ ɣa, kjan alaŋ na rɣajuŋ, ro alaŋ rkinos~ɕ nja maki alaŋ kiŋjan kja, ro alaŋ na βuta, ro alaŋ na pjaħow, ro alaŋ ʦ~ʨiŋan, nja s~ɕjow tuʔij βiħ alaŋ na ʦ~ʨiŋan kja, ro alaŋ iju, ro pajat kwara alaŋ na s~ɕtaʦ~ʨis~ɕ kja ɣa kjan s~ɕjow βutej, rɣjax, ro alaŋ koro, alaŋ koro ɣa nja maki βiħ alaŋ s~ɕtaʦ~ʨis~ɕ kja uj. kwara ħŋijaŋ ke knajan kja ɣa uβuj ke na ʦ~ʨjoli tajal βiħ utux lljuŋ kles~ɕan, kruma nja maki alaŋ rɣajuŋ ro alaŋ na kiŋjaŋ, ro alaŋ ʦ~ʨiŋan uj ɣa nja uβuj ħŋijaŋ ke na s~ɕquliq kruma uj. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ***jawi*nomin, .
